package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for background_jobs_registered_from_gin_packages_instead_of_bootstrap: Scheduler or worker registration hidden inside Gin transport packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule007NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule007NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule007NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario007Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule007NegativeService, input Rule007NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
